mapper.insert: insert into wf_hist_order (id, process_Id, order_State, creator, create_Time, end_Time, parent_Id, expire_Time, order_No, variable) values (#{id}, #{processId}, #{orderState}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{endTime}, #{parentId}, #{expireTime}, #{orderNo}, #{variable})
mapper.select: select o.id, o.process_Id, o.order_State, o.priority, o.creator, o.create_Time, o.end_Time, o.parent_Id, o.expire_Time, o.order_No, o.variable from wf_hist_order o where id = #{orderId}
